changes.value: Extract the list_processes operation from shell/mod.rs into shell/list_processes/mod.rs as specified by user. Move ListProcesses struct, LIST_PROCESSES_PARAMS, impl Operation, execute_list_processes handler, and tests.
Extract list_processes operation into its own module
